entities.context: Tagging each statement with speaker name or role

entities.context: Vector representations used for semantic similarity matching

relationships.context: Normalisation runs transcript through cleanup function
Taxonomy provides keyword and pattern marking
Catches paraphrased signals missed by exact patterns
Filters detected signals against embargo rules
